channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: White House Calls Mark Hamill a 'Sick Individual' Over Trump Post
item.description: Famed 'Star Wars' actor Mark Hamill is facing backlash from the White House after posting a message on social media Wednesday criticizing President Do...

item.title: New: Chinese-Owned Tanker Attacked, Set on Fire Near Hormuz Amid Iran Conflict
Left-wing local leader torched after griping about American flags, pushing ‘more relatable’ replacement
item.description: A Lynnwood, Washington, councilwoman said a pride flag is more relatable than an American flag and suggested changes to a local park's flag display.

item.title: Hot Takes: Obama's Effort to Attack Trump on Weaponization Accidentally Backfires on Him
